creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 240214
Update to 23.02.0

Changelog: https://carlschwan.eu/2023/02/17/tokodon-23.02.0-release/

Added the following to USE_KDE: auth codecs configwidgets
because it links to:
- lib/libKF5Auth.so.5 from devel/kf5-kauth
- lib/libKF5Codecs.so.5 from textproc/kf5-kcodecs
- lib/libKF5ConfigWidgets.so.5 from x11-toolkits/kf5-kconfigwidgets

QA for 13.1:
- poudriere ok
- run-time ok
